data.body:
EPIC CONSISTENCY AUDIT (re-read CONTRIBUTING/CLAUDE/SUPPORT/README + all new docs — GOVERNANCE/MAINTAINERS/CODE_OF_CONDUCT, your-first-change, review-policy, releasing, release-notes, dco-rollout-evidence, ADR 0037/0038, issue templates, dependabot.yml, lockdown.yml, cliff.toml, CHANGELOG — as one set).

PASS (7/8 invariants):
1. Vote-semantics SINGLE-SOURCE: the coverage-gap sub-reason enumeration (gate-disabled/llm-unavailable/scanner/review-error/indeterminate/merge-review) is a contributor-facing table ONLY in docs/review-policy.md; CONTRIBUTING §2c is the slimmed summary+pointer; README + tutorial don't duplicate it. (docs/adr/0015 mentions the tags as an internal historical record — allowed.)
2. PR posture (read-only mirror, PRs redirect to Gerrit via lockdown bot) consistent across README/CONTRIBUTING/SUPPORT/GOVERNANCE/ADR-0037/lockdown.yml/dependabot.yml/issue templates.
3. Issues ENABLED as primary channel; Discussions OFF — consistent.
4. DCO consistent (git commit -s / developercertificate.org / DCO-not-CLA) across CONTRIBUTING/tutorial/CLAUDE.
5. CoC contact identical (hello@navapbc.com, role-based) in SUPPORT + CODE_OF_CONDUCT, matches GOVERNANCE §6.
6. Gerrit URL consistent everywhere.
7. Outsider push uses 'git push origin HEAD:refs/for/main' with no Nava-internal refs.

FIXED (1 real contradiction): CONTRIBUTING §5 claimed Dependabot version-update PRs were 'intentionally NOT configured', contradicting the dependabot.yml that chihuahua shipped + releasing.md + ADR-0037. Remediated in change 472 (§5 now describes the github-actions advisory-PR posture + no-pip-ecosystem rationale). 
FALSE POSITIVE (no action): an audit finding claimed SUPPORT.md references a non-existent PR template; .github/pull_request_template.md does exist (canary links it) — SUPPORT.md is correct.

Also: 0 dangling relative links across all new/edited docs. Audit COMPLETE; the one contradiction is remediated.
